For every enemy in a 900 yard area around you, gain a 2% / 4% / 6% Damage Bonus and 0.33 / 0.66 / 1 Armor. Capped at 8 enemies for Ranged Heroes and at 12 enemies for Melee Heroes.
Whenever there are 3 or more enemies nearby, you become a Storm Crow for 6 / 8 / 10 secs, increasing Attack Speed, Spellhaste and Ability AOE Damage by 100%.

For every enemy in a 900 yard area around you, obtienes a 2% / 4% / 6% daño Bonus and 0.33 / 0.66 / 1 armadura. Capped at 8 enemies for Ranged Heroes and at 12 enemies for Melee Heroes.

descPt: For every enemy in a 900 yard area around you, gain a 2% / 4% / 6% dano Bonus and 0.33 / 0.66 / 1 Armadura. Capped at 8 enemies for Ranged Heroes and at 12 enemies for Melee Heroes. Whenever there are 3 or more enemies nearby, you become a Storm Crow for 6 / 8 / 10 s, increasing Velocidade de ataque, Spellhaste and Ability AOE dano by 100%.

Each Auto Attack has a 15% chance and every Channel Ability Damage instance has a 30% chance to cause a Storm Strike, dealing Holy Physical Nature Damage equal to 100% / 200% / 300% of your Attack Damage,
jumping to 2 additional targets with 50% Damage Reduction per jump and granting 5 / 10 / 15 Spell Resistance for 5 secs (stacking up to 30 Spell Resistance). Has an inner cooldown of 0.1 secs.

Has an inner cooldown of 0.1 s.

descPt: When you land an Ataque automático or cast your 1st Ability, the cooldown of your Ability with the highest remaining cooldown will be reduced by 0.1 / 0.2 / 0.3 s, capped at 0.75 s.

descPt: Debuffs that deal dano over Time now tick 10% / 20% / 30% faster, capped at 50%. When you cast your 4th Ability, gain 10% Lifesteal and 250 Velocidade de ataque and Spellhaste for 3 / 3.5 / 4 s, capped at 8 s. Has an inner cooldown of 25 s.

descPt: Whenever you land an Ataque automático, gain 5 / 10 / 15 Dano de ataque for 5 s, stacking up to 100 times.

name: Reign of Chaos
desc:
While above 50% of max Resource (Mana or Energy), all Ability Damage and Healing is increased by 25% / 50% / 75%, but you pay an additional 3% of max Resource per Damage / Healing instance.
When you deal Chaos Damage, the Reign of Chaos Bonus is doubled.

name: Chaos Knight

Whenever you deal daño, there is a 7% probabilidad to summon a Bone Warrior dealing Físico Sombra daño equal to 100% / 200% / 300% of your Fuerza, Agilidad and Intelecto, lasting 10 s. Max 3 / 4 / 5 Bone Warriors.

name: Lunar Eclipse
desc: Gain 3 Lunar Eclipse stacks every 5 secs that get consumed when dealing Damage / Healing with an Ability, stacking up to 15 times. While you have Lunar Eclipse stacks, Ability Critical Strike Damage and Critical Healing is increased by 35% / 70% / 105%.
descEs: obtienes 3 Lunar Eclipse acumulaciones every 5 s that get consumed cuando infligir daño / curación con an habilidad, acumulándose hasta 15 times. mientras tú have Lunar Eclipse acumulaciones, daño de habilidad de golpe crítico y curación crítica is increased by 35% / 70% / 105%.
descPt: Gain 3 Lunar Eclipse stacks every 5 s that get consumed when dealing dano / cura with an Ability, stacking up to 15 times. While you have Lunar Eclipse stacks, Ability Acerto crítico dano and Cura crítica is increased by 35% / 70% / 105%.

name: Butterfly Effect
desc: When you deal Damage with your first Ability, your next Damage instance with your second Ability deals Bonus Damage. When this Bonus Damage occurs, your next Damage instance with your third Ability deals Bonus Damage. This repeats until you reach your 6th Ability. Whenever you deal Damage with your first Ability, everything is reset. The initial Damage Bonus is 10% / 20% / 30% and it doubles on each jump. Capped at level 3.
descEs: When you deal daño with your first Ability, your next daño instance with your s Ability deals Bonus daño. When this Bonus daño occurs, your next daño instance with your third Ability deals Bonus daño. This repeats until you reach your 6th Ability. Whenever you deal daño with your first Ability, everything is reset. The initial daño Bonus is 10% / 20% / 30% and it doubles on each jump. Capped at level 3.
descPt: When you deal dano with your first Ability, your next dano instance with your sond Ability deals Bonus dano. When this Bonus dano occurs, your next dano instance with your third Ability deals Bonus dano. This repeats until you reach your 6th Ability. Whenever you deal dano with your first Ability, everything is reset. The initial dano Bonus is 10% / 20% / 30% and it doubles on each jump.

name: Starfire
desc: All Ability Damage is increased by 5% / 10% / 15% per Elemental Damage type in the Damage instance. This Damage Bonus doubles on Critical Strikes, Pure Damage and AOE Damage instances, stacking multiplicatively.
descEs: All daño de habilidad is increased by 5% / 10% / 15% per Elemental daño type in the daño instance. This daño bono doubles on golpe críticos, Puro daño y AOE daño instances, acumulándose multiplicatively.
descPt: All Dano de habilidade is increased by 5% / 10% / 15% per Elemental dano type in the dano instance. This dano Bonus doubles on Acerto críticos, Pure dano and AOE dano instances, stacking multiplicatively.

name: Dragonfury
desc: Increases the effectiveness of all Elemental Damage Bonuses by 33% / 66% / 100%. Whenever you cause 2 or more Elemental Damage Types in the same Damage instance (excluding Physical), increase all Ability Damage by 15% / 30% / 45% for 5 secs.
descEs: aumenta the effectiveness de all Elemental daño Bonuses by 33% / 66% / 100%. cada vez que tú cause 2 o more Elemental daño Types in the same daño instance (excluding Físico), aumenta todo el daño de habilidad by 15% / 30% / 45% durante 5 s.
descPt: Increases the effectiveness of all Elemental dano Bonuses by 33% / 66% / 100%. Whenever you cause 2 or more Elemental dano Types in the same dano instance (excluding Physical), increase all Dano de habilidade by 15% / 30% / 45% for 5 s.

name: Cataclysm
desc: Gain 1 / 1.5 / 2 Health per Intellect and whenever you deal AOE Damage, add 100% / 200% / 300% of your Strength, Agility, Intellect and Spellpower to its base Damage.
descEs: Obtienes 1 / 1.5 / 2 vida per Intelecto and whenever you deal AOE daño, add 100% / 200% / 300% of your Fuerza, Agilidad, Intelecto and poder de hechizo to its base daño.
descPt: Gain 1 / 1.5 / 2 Vida per Intelecto and whenever you deal AOE dano, add 100% / 150% / 200% of your Força, Agilidade, Intelecto and Poder mágico to its base dano.

name: Song of Ice and Fire
desc: After casting your first Ability, your next Ability Damage instance with your second Ability has a 33% / 66% / 100% chance to also be of type Fire and to deal 100% increased Damage and restore 2 / 4 / 6 Mana. After casting your second Ability, your next Ability Damage instance with your first Ability has a 33% / 66% / 100% chance to also be of type Frost and to deal 100% increased Damage and restore 2 / 4 / 6 Mana. Capped at level 3.
descEs: After casting your first Ability, your next daño de habilidad instance with your s Ability has a 33% / 66% / 100% probabilidad to also be of type Fuego and to deal 100% increased daño and restore 2 / 4 / 6 maná. After casting your s Ability, your next daño de habilidad instance with your first Ability has a 33% / 66% / 100% probabilidad to also be of type Escarcha and to deal 100% increased daño and restore 2 / 4 / 6 maná. Capped at level 3.
descPt: After casting your first Ability, your next Dano de habilidade instance with your sond Ability has a 33% / 66% / 100% chance to also be of type Fire and to deal 100% increased dano. After casting your sond Ability, your next Dano de habilidade instance with your first Ability has a 33% / 66% / 100% chance to also be of type Frost and to deal 100% increased dano.

name: Savagery
desc: Increase all Ability Damage by 20% / 40% / 60%, but pay 1% of max Health per Damage instance. Only affects Abilities with a base cooldown of 5 secs or less. You can not die from this.
descEs: aumenta todo el daño de habilidad by 20% / 40% / 60%, but pay 1% de max vida per daño instance. solo affects habilidades con a base cooldown de 5 s o less. tú can not die from this.
descPt: Increase all Dano de habilidade by 20% / 40% / 60%, but pay 1% of max Vida per dano instance. Only affects Abilities with a base cooldown of 5 s or less. You can not die from this.

name: Lycanthrope
desc: After having caused a Healing, Ability, and Auto Attack Critical Strike, increase all Damage by 20% / 35% / 50% for 10 secs. Twice as effective for Summons and Companions. Can not proc while active.
descEs: después de having causado a curación, habilidad, y ataque automático golpe crítico, aumenta todo el daño by 20% / 35% / 50% durante 10 s. dos veces as effective durante Summons y Companions. Can not proc mientras active.
descPt: After having caused a cura, Ability, and Ataque automático Acerto crítico, increase all dano by 20% / 35% / 50% for 10 s. Twice as effective for Summons and Companions. Can not proc while active.

name: Primal Power
desc: Each first row Path Talent that is exactly Level 3 will gain + 1 / 2 / 3 Levels. Can affect at most 3 Paths, choosen from left to right. Capped at level 3.
descEs: Each first row Path Talent that is exactly Level 3 will obtienes + 1 / 2 / 3 Levels. Can affect at most 3 Paths, choosen from left to right. Capped at level 3.
descPt: Each first row Path Talent that is exactly Level 3 will gain + 1 / 2 / 3 Levels.

name: Psychic Link
desc: Every 100 Spellpower grant 1% / 2% / 3% increased Ability Damage.
descEs: Every 100 poder de hechizo grant 1% / 2% / 3% increased daño de habilidad.
descPt: Whenever you silence an enemy, strike them for 500% / 1000% / 1500% of your Dano de ataque plus Poder mágico as Shadow Chaos dano, stun them for 1 / 2 / 3 s and Heal yourself for 5% / 10% / 15% of max Vida, with an inner cooldown of 5 s.

name: Nemesis
desc: Every 4th / 3rd / 2nd Finishing Move against the same target does not consume Combo Points. Finishing Moves are Fatal Throw, Resolve, Dire Cut, Venom Strike, Elemental Overload, Wild Fury, Blood Feast, Chaos Blast, Demon Bolt, Hellfire and Meteor Crash. Capped at level 3.
descEs: Every 4th / 3rd / 2nd Finishing Move against the same target does not consume Combo Points. Finishing Moves are Fatal Throw, Resolve, Dire Cut, Venom Strike, Elemental Overload, Wild Fury, Blood Feast, Caos Blast, Demon Bolt, Hellfire and Meteor Crash. Capped at level 3.
descPt: Every 4th / 3rd / 2nd Finishing Move against the same target does not consume Combo Points. Finishing Moves are Fatal Throw, Resolve, Dire Cut, Venom Strike, Elemental Overload, Wild Fury, Blood Feast, Chaos Blast, Demon Bolt, Hellfire and Meteor Crash.

name: Genesis
desc:
Auto Attacks and Abilities that are Level 1 deal 45% / 90% / 135% increased Damage.
At the beginning of the game and whenever you are revived, gain 25% Damage and Damage Reduction for 180 / 240 / 300 secs.
descEs:
ataques básicos and Abilities that are Level 1 deal 45% / 90% / 135% increased daño.
At the beginning of the game and whenever you are revived, obtienes 25% daño and reducción de daño for 180 / 240 / 300 s.
descPt: At the beginning of the game and whenever you are revived, gain 30% dano and dano Reduction for 180 / 240 / 300 s.

name: Typhoon Thunder
desc: Gain a Typhoon charge every 5 secs, stacking up to 10 times. Whenever you're in combat and there's an enemy within 900 yards, strike it for 500% / 1000% / 1500% of all Attributes as Nature Damage and restore 5% / 10% / 15% of max Resource.
descEs: Obtienes a Typhoon charge every 5 s, stacking up to 10 times. Whenever you're in combat and there's an enemy within 900 yards, strike it for 500% / 1000% / 1500% of all Attributes as Naturaleza daño and restore 5% / 10% / 15% of max Resource.
descPt: Gain a Typhoon charge every 5 s, stacking up to 10 times. Whenever you're in combat and there's an enemy within 900 yards, strike it for 250% / 500% / 750% of all Attributes as Nature dano and restore 3% / 6% / 9% of max Resource.

name: Hysteria
desc: Auto Attack the closest enemy every 3 / 2 / 1 secs and increase the max cap of Abilities with charges by 1 / 2 / 3. Auto Attack Range is 300 yards for Melee and 900 yards for Ranged. Capped at level 3.
descEs: ataque básico the closest enemy every 3 / 2 / 1 s and aumenta the max cap of Abilities with charges by 1 / 2 / 3. ataque básico Range is 300 yards for Melee and 900 yards for Ranged. Capped at level 3.
descPt: Ataque automático the closest enemy every 3 / 2 / 1 s and increase the max cap of Abilities with charges by 1 / 2 / 3. Ataque automático Range is 300 yards for Melee and 900 yards for Ranged.

name: Natural Disaster
desc: Whenever you proc a Natural Disaster, there is a 5% / 10% / 15% chance to proc all other Natural Disasters you have learned, with an inner cooldown of 3 secs, ignoring all other inner cooldowns. Natural Disasters are Rain of Stars, Blizzard, Ice Storm, Storm Strike, Epidemic and Typhoon Thunder.
descEs: Whenever you proc a Natural Disaster, there is a 5% / 10% / 15% probabilidad to proc all other Natural Disasters you have learned, with an inner cooldown of 3 s, ignoring all other inner cooldowns. Natural Disasters are Rain of Stars, Blizzard, Ice Storm, Storm Strike, Epidemic and Typhoon Thunder.
descPt: Whenever you proc a Natural Disaster, there is a 5% / 10% / 15% chance to proc all other Natural Disasters you have learned, with an inner cooldown of 3 s, ignoring all other inner cooldowns. Natural Disasters are Rain of Stars, Blizzard, Ice Storm, Storm Strike, Epidemic and Typhoon.

name: Five Horsemen
desc:
Your Abilities gain one out of five Effects, based on their Level. Abilities hidden by Shapeshifting or Stance changes do not count.
Level 1: Passive + 3% / 6% / 9% Movement Speed and 25 / 50 / 75 Attack Speed. Level 2: + 3 / 6 / 9 passive Armor. Level 3: + 5% / 10% / 15% chance to Critical Strike for 500% with that Ability. Level 4: + 5% / 10% / 15% chance to deal Pure Damage with that Ability and 10% / 20% / 30% chance to add Chaos Damage Type. Level 5: Vampiric Strike - Dealing Damage with that Ability has a 25% chance to heal you for 5% / 10% / 15% of your Primary Attribute, inner cooldown 1.5 secs.
descEs:
Your Abilities obtienes one out of five Effects, based on their Level. Abilities hidden by Shapeshifting or Stance changes do not count.
Level 1: Pasiva + 3% / 6% / 9% velocidad de movimiento and 25 / 50 / 75 velocidad de ataque. Level 2: + 3 / 6 / 9 passive armadura. Level 3: + 5% / 10% / 15% probabilidad to golpe crítico for 500% with that Ability. Level 4: + 5% / 10% / 15% probabilidad to deal Puro daño with that Ability and 10% / 20% / 30% probabilidad to add Caos daño Type. Level 5: Vampiric Strike - Dealing daño with that Ability has a 25% probabilidad to heal you for 5% / 10% / 15% of your Primary Attribute, inner cooldown 1.5 s.
descPt: Your Abilities gain one out of four Effects, based on their Level. Level 1 Passive + 3% / 6% / 9% Velocidade de movimento and 25 / 50 / 75 Velocidade de ataque. Level 2 + 3 / 6 / 9 passive Armadura. Level 3 + 5% / 10% / 15% chance to Acerto crítico for 200% with that Ability. Level 4 + 5% / 10% / 15% chance to deal Pure dano with that Ability and 10% / 20% / 30% chance to add Chaos dano Type.

name: Mutation
desc: All Damage is increased by 15% / 30% / 45% per Path Mutation Effect on your Hero. Path Mutation Effects are: Wolf Rage, Bestial Wrath, From the Shadows, Shadow Form, Storm Crow and Crowfall.
descEs: All daño is increased by 15% / 30% / 45% per Path Mutation Effect on your Hero. Path Mutation Effects are: Wolf Rage, Bestial Wrath, From the Shadows, Sombra Form, Storm Crow and Crowfall.
descPt: All dano is increased by 10% / 20% / 30% per Path Mutation Effect on your Hero. Path Mutation Effects are Wolf Rage, Bestial Wrath, From the Shadows, Shadow Form, Storm Crow and Crowfall.

name: Infestor
desc: Stack based Debuffs gain + 1 / 2 / 3 max stacks and all debuffs last 0.5 / 1 / 1.5 secs longer.
descEs: Stack based Debuffs obtienes + 1 / 2 / 3 max acumulaciones y all debuffs last 0.5 / 1 / 1.5 s longer.
descPt: Stack based Debuffs gain + 1 / 2 / 3 max stacks and all debuffs last 0.5 / 1 / 1.5 s longer.

name: Tree of Life
desc: Gain a Health Aura, increasing the max Health of all Heroes by 5% / 10% / 15%. Once per game, when the first Hero goes down to only 1 Life, replenish 1 / 2 / 3 Lifes. Both Effects stack with other Players. Capped at level 3.
descEs: Obtienes a vida Aura, increasing the max vida of all Heroes by 5% / 10% / 15%. Once per game, when the first Hero goes down to only 1 Life, replenish 1 / 2 / 3 Lifes. Both Effects stack with other Players. Capped at level 3.
descPt: Gain an HP Aura, increasing the max Vida of all Heroes by 5% / 10% / 15%. Once per game, when the first Hero goes down to only 1 Life, replenish 1 / 2 / 3 Lifes. Both Effects stack with other Players.

name: Mountain Giant
desc:
+ 5% / 10% / 15% Damage Reduction.
While Molten Giant, Storm Giant and Arcane Giant are on cooldown, gain 25% / 50% / 75% Damage and 10% / 20% / 30% Damage Reduction. Capped at level 3.
descEs:
+ 5% / 10% / 15% reducción de daño.
While Molten Giant, Storm Giant and Arcano Giant are on cooldown, obtienes 25% / 50% / 75% daño and 10% / 20% / 30% reducción de daño. Capped at level 3.
descPt: While Molten Giant, Storm Giant and Arcane Giant are on cooldown, gain 15% / 30% / 45% dano and dano Reduction.

name: Mark of Nature
desc: Stack based Buffs gain + 1 / 2 / 3 max stacks and whenever you Dispel an ally, heal you and the target for 15% / 30% / 45% of max Health. Capped at level 3.
descEs: Stack based Buffs obtienes + 1 / 2 / 3 max stacks and whenever you Dispel an ally, heal you and the target for 15% / 30% / 45% of max vida. Capped at level 3.
descPt: Stack based Buffs gain + 1 / 2 / 3 max stacks and whenever you Dispel an ally, heal you and the target for 15% / 30% / 45% of max Vida.

name: Elusiveness
desc: After being Attacked, gain 100% Evasion for 3 / 4 / 5 secs, with an inner cooldown of 45 secs.
descEs: After being Attacked, obtienes 100% Evasion for 3 / 4 / 5 s, with an inner cooldown of 45 s.
descPt: After being Attacked, gain 90% Evasion for 3 / 4 / 5 s, with an inner cooldown of 45 s.

name: Dual Wielding
desc: Your next Auto Attack hits twice, with an inner cooldown of 4 / 3 / 2 secs, capped at 1 sec. Passively gain Auto Attack Damage equal to 33% / 66% / 100% of your Agility, not affecting Abilities.
descEs: Your next ataque básico hits twice, with an inner cooldown of 4 / 3 / 2 s, capped at 1 s. Passively obtienes Auto daño de ataque equal to 33% / 66% / 100% of your Agilidad, not affecting Abilities.
descPt: Your next Ataque automático hits twice, with an inner cooldown of 4 / 3 / 2 s, capped at 1 s. Passively gain Auto Dano de ataque equal to 20% / 40% / 60% of your Agilidade, not affecting Abilities.

name: Dark Initiation
desc: When you cast your first Ability, gain 75 / 150 / 225 Attack Speed and Spellhaste for 5 secs, with an inner cooldown of 15 secs.
descEs: When you cast your first Ability, obtienes 75 / 150 / 225 velocidad de ataque and celeridad de hechizos for 5 s, with an inner cooldown of 15 s.
descPt: When you cast your first Ability, gain 75 / 150 / 225 Velocidade de ataque and Spellhaste for 5 s, with an inner cooldown of 30 s.

name: Weapon Mastery
desc: Gain a Bonus based on your Primary Attribute. Strength: Gain 3% / 6% / 9% Physical Elemental Damage for every 100 Strength. Agility: Dealing Damage with your 2nd Ability increases your Ability Damage by 0.5% / 1% / 1.5% for 5 secs, stacking 50 times. Intellect: Dealing Damage over Time increases your Ability Damage by 0.5% / 1% / 1.5% for 3 secs, stacking 50 times.
descEs: Obtienes a Bonus based on your Primary Attribute. Fuerza: Obtienes 3% / 6% / 9% Físico Elemental daño for every 100 Fuerza. Agilidad: Dealing daño with your 2nd Ability increases your daño de habilidad by 0.5% / 1% / 1.5% for 5 s, stacking 50 times. Intelecto: Dealing daño over Time increases your daño de habilidad by 0.5% / 1% / 1.5% for 3 s, stacking 50 times.
descPt: Gain a Bonus based on your Atributo principal. Força After casting your 3rd Ability, increase all dano by 2.5% / 5% / 7.5% for 5 s, stacking 10 times. Agilidade Dealing dano with your 2nd Ability increases your Dano de habilidade by 0.5% / 1% / 1.5% for 5 s, stacking 50 times. Intelecto Dealing dano over Time increases your Dano de habilidade by 0.5% / 1% / 1.5% for 3 s, stacking 50 times.

name: Marked for Death
desc: After 25 Auto Attacks against the same target, lower their Armor by 6 for 2 / 3 / 4 secs. Does not stack multiple times.
descEs: After 25 ataques básicos against the same target, lower their armadura by 6 for 2 / 3 / 4 s. Does not stack multiple times.
descPt: After 25 Ataques automáticos against the same target, lower their Armadura by 6 for 1 / 2 / 3 s. Does not stack multiple times.

name: Shield Shatter
desc: Targeting an enemy with an Ability has a 3% / 5% / 7% chance to lower their Spell Resistance by 50 for 4 secs. Does not stack multiple times.
descEs: Targeting an enemy with an Ability has a 3% / 5% / 7% probabilidad to lower their resistencia mágica by 50 for 4 s. Does not stack multiple times.
descPt: Targeting an enemy with an Ability has a 3% / 5% / 7% chance to lower their Resistência mágica by 50 for 3 s. Does not stack multiple times.

name: Alacrity
desc: Abilities with base cooldowns of 30 secs or less have their cooldown reduction cap changed from 66% to 69% / 72% / 75%. In addition, increases the tick rate of Dots and Channeled Abilities by 3% / 6% / 9% for every 100 Agility, capped at 50%.
descEs: habilidades con base cooldowns de 30 s o less have su cooldown reduction cap changed from 66% a 69% / 72% / 75%. In addition, aumenta the tick rate de Dots y Channeled habilidades by 3% / 6% / 9% durante every 100 Agilidad, con un máximo de 50%.
descPt: Abilities with base cooldowns of 30 s or less have their cooldown reduction cap changed from 66% to 69% / 72% / 75%. In addition, increases the tick rate of Dots and Channeled Abilities by 3% / 6% / 9% for every 100 Agilidade, capped at 50%.

name: Cold Blood
desc: Add a flat additive 2% / 4% / 6% to all damaging Ability and Auto Attack Critical Strike chances.
descEs: Add a flat additive 2% / 4% / 6% to all damaging Ability and ataque básico golpe crítico chances.
descPt: Add a flat additive 1% / 2% / 3% to all damaging Ability and Ataque automático Acerto crítico chances.

name: Blood Moon
desc: When you fall below 50% of max Health, reset all Ability cooldowns and reduce all Damage taken by 90% for 2 / 3 / 4 secs, with an inner cooldown of 300 / 240 / 180 secs, capped at 90 secs.
descEs: When you fall below 50% of max vida, reset all Ability cooldowns and reduce all daño taken by 90% for 2 / 3 / 4 s, with an inner cooldown of 300 / 240 / 180 s, capped at 90 s.
descPt: When you fall below 50% of max Vida, reset all Ability cooldowns and reduce all dano taken by 90% for 1 / 2 / 3 s, with an inner cooldown of 300 / 240 / 180 s.

name: Trickster
desc: Reduce all Item cooldowns by 15% / 30% / 45% and after using an Item Ability, increase all Damage by 15% / 30% / 45% for 10 secs.
descEs: Reduce all Item cooldowns by 15% / 30% / 45% and after using an Item Ability, aumenta all daño by 15% / 30% / 45% for 10 s.
descPt: Reduce all Item cooldowns by 15% / 30% / 45% and after using an Item Ability, increase all dano by 10% / 20% / 30% for 5 s.

name: Executioner
desc: Your Ability with the highest base cooldown gains 33% / 66% / 100% increased Ability Damage. Abilities you have not learned and abilities with zero cooldown do not count.
descEs: Your Ability with the highest base cooldown gains 33% / 66% / 100% increased daño de habilidad. Abilities you have not learned and abilities with zero cooldown do not count.
descPt: Your Ability with the highest base cooldown gains 25% / 50% / 75% increased Dano de habilidade. Abilities you have not learned and abilities with zero cooldown do not count.

name: Rogue Resistance
desc:
While your Damage Reduction is 50% or higher, increase all Damage by 15% / 30% / 45%. This effect only refers to the actual stat Damage Reduction, not Armor or Spell Resistance.
Tanks receive 3 times the Damage Bonus and non-Tanks passively gain +10% / 20% / 30% max Health.
descEs:
While your reducción de daño is 50% or higher, aumenta all daño by 15% / 30% / 45%. This effect only refers to the actual stat reducción de daño, not armadura or resistencia mágica.
Tanks receive 3 times the daño Bonus and non-Tanks passively obtienes +10% / 20% / 30% max vida.
descPt: While your dano Reduction is 50% or higher, increase all dano by 15% / 30% / 45%. This effect only refers to the actual stat dano Reduction, not Armadura or Resistência mágica.

name: Inner Focus
desc: Inner cooldowns are reduced by 10% / 20% / 30% (capped at 30%), Channeled Abilities deal 10% / 20% / 30% increased Damage and all Resource Regeneration is increased by 10% / 20% / 30%.
descEs: Inner cooldowns are reduced by 10% / 20% / 30% (capped at 30%), Channeled Abilities deal 10% / 20% / 30% increased daño and all Resource Regeneration is increased by 10% / 20% / 30%.
descPt: Inner cooldowns are reduced by 10% / 20% / 30%, Channeled Abilities deal 10% / 20% / 30% increased dano and all Mana Regeneration is increased by 10% / 20% / 30% (does not affect non-Mana Heroes).

name: Deadly Arsenal
desc:
Each of your damaging Abilities gains a guaranteed Critical Strike for 150% / 200% / 250%, each with an inner cooldown of 20 secs and Auto Attack Critical Strikes deal 25% / 50% / 75% increased Damage.
After having caused Damage with 4 different Abilities, gain 25% / 50% / 75% increased Damage for 10 secs.
descEs:
Each of your damaging Abilities gains a guaranteed golpe crítico for 150% / 200% / 250%, each with an inner cooldown of 20 s and ataque básico Critical Strikes deal 25% / 50% / 75% increased daño.
After having caused daño with 4 different Abilities, obtienes 25% / 50% / 75% increased daño for 10 s.
descPt: Each of your damaging Abilities gains a guaranteed Acerto crítico for 150% / 200% / 250%, each with an inner cooldown of 20 s and Ataque automático Acerto críticos deal 10% / 20% / 30% increased dano.

name: Ambush
desc: After being invisibile for at least 1 sec, your next 10 Damage instances deal 30% / 60% / 90% increased Damage. Whenever you cast an Ability with a base cooldown of 45 secs or higher, become invisibile for 2 / 3 / 4 secs.
descEs: después de being invisibile durante at least 1 s, tu next 10 daño instances infligir 30% / 60% / 90% increased daño. cada vez que tú cast an habilidad con a base cooldown de 45 s o higher, become invisibile durante 2 / 3 / 4 s.
descPt: After being invisibile for at least 1 s, your next 10 dano instances deal 30% / 60% / 90% increased dano. Whenever you cast an Ability with a base cooldown of 45 s or higher, become invisibile for 2 / 3 / 4 s.

name: Preparation
desc: Ability cooldowns can not exceed 50 / 45 / 40 secs, taking effect after other reductions. Whenever this effect alters a cooldown, increase your Primary Attribute by 15% / 30% / 45% for 7 secs. Capped at level 3.
descEs: Ability cooldowns can not exceed 50 / 45 / 40 s, taking effect after other reductions. Whenever this effect alters a cooldown, aumenta your Primary Attribute by 15% / 30% / 45% for 7 s. Capped at level 3.
descPt: Ability cooldowns can not exceed 45 / 40 / 35 s, taking effect after other reductions. Whenever this effect alters a cooldown, increase your Atributo principal by 15% / 30% / 45% for 7 s.

name: Killing Spree
desc: Whenever a Boss gets killed, gain 125 Agility and 5% Movement Speed for 60 / 120 / 180 secs, with multiple instances of this buff stacking.
descEs: Whenever a Boss gets killed, obtienes 125 Agilidad and 5% velocidad de movimiento for 60 / 120 / 180 s, with multiple instances of this buff stacking.
descPt: Whenever a Boss gets killed, gain 100 Agilidade and 5% Velocidade de movimento for 20 / 40 / 60 s, with multiple instances of this buff stacking.

name: Phantom Shade
desc:
Increase the Ability Critical Strike Damage gained from Agility by 33% / 66% / 100% and also apply 33% / 66% / 100% of that Bonus to your Auto Attack Critical Strike Damage.
After casting your 4th Ability, reduce all Damage taken by 75% for 2 / 4 / 6 secs, with an inner cooldown of 30 secs.
descEs:
Aumenta the Ability daño de golpe crítico gained from Agilidad by 33% / 66% / 100% and also apply 33% / 66% / 100% of that Bonus to your ataque básico daño de golpe crítico.
After casting your 4th Ability, reduce all daño taken by 75% for 2 / 4 / 6 s, with an inner cooldown of 30 s.
descPt: After casting your 4th Ability, reduce all dano taken by 75% for 2 / 3 / 4 s, with an inner cooldown of 30 s.

name: Vitality
desc: Gain 5 / 10 / 15 Health per Level.
descEs: Obtienes 5 / 10 / 15 vida per Level.

name: Flurry
desc:
Auto Attacks automatically cast 2 Spender Abilities, when you have the required resources for it. When this procs, gain 15% / 30% / 45% increased Damage for 2 secs.
Spender Abilities are Wounding Strike, Slaughter, Power Shot, Cobra Shot and Frostshatter Arrow.
descEs:
ataques básicos automatically cast 2 Spender Abilities, when you have the required resources for it. When this procs, obtienes 15% / 30% / 45% increased daño for 2 s.
Spender Abilities are Wounding Strike, Slaughter, Power Shot, Cobra Shot and Frostshatter Arrow.

name: Tunnel Vision
desc:
After casting of certain Abilities increases Spellhaste by 3 / 6 / 9 for 3 secs, stacking.
